title: epipremnum dahlii
intro: Epipremnum dahlii, also known as the Sky Plant or Dragon Tail, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. Native to New Caledonia, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its aerial roots, which contain a compound called calcium oxalate crystals, making it toxic if ingested. However, in herbal preparations, the plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Epipremnum dahlii include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
